text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇲🇱 Russia’s Africa Corps says the situation in Mali remains difficult, with its forces and Malian troops continuing operations against militant groups, including airstrikes targeting camps over the past day. The first clip was taken by a Bayraktar TB2…" ⚡️ 🇲🇱 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 The Russian Ministry of Defence has released footage of strikes against JNIM terrorists during hostilities on April 25th in Mali. They report the operation was an attempted coup and claimed the attackers numbered around 12,000 fighters who tried to seize key sites in the capital of Bamako. Russia’s Africa Corps, alongside Malian troops, repelled the attacks using drones, helicopters, aircraft and ground forces, claiming heavy militant losses and the destruction of vehicles and equipment. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇷🇺🇲🇱 俄罗斯非洲军团表示，马里的局势依然严峻，其部队与马里军队继续针对武装团体开展行动，包括过去一天对营地进行的空袭。第一段视频由 Bayraktar TB2 拍摄……” ⚡️ 🇲🇱 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国防部发布了 4 月 25 日在马里敌对行动期间打击 JNIM 恐怖分子的视频。他们报告称，此次行动是一场未遂政变，并声称袭击者人数约为 12,000 名，他们试图夺取首都巴马科的关键地点。俄罗斯非洲军团与马里军队一道，利用无人机、直升机、飞机和地面部队击退了袭击，声称武装分子损失惨重，并摧毁了车辆和装备。@wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix RT @atrupar : standing ovation after King Charles sings the praises of NATO and says "that same unyielding resolve is needed for the defense of Ukraine" https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @atrupar：查尔斯国王歌颂北约并表示“保卫乌克兰需要同样的坚定决心”后，全场起立鼓掌 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Comey responds: "Well, they're back. This time about a picture of seashells on a North Carolina beach a year ago, and this won't be the end of it. But nothing has changed with me. I'm still innocent, I'm still not afraid, and I still believe in the independent federal judiciary, so let's go. But it's really important that all of us remember this is not who we are as a country. This is not how the Department of Justice is supposed to be. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Comey 回应：“好吧，他们又来了。这次是因为一年前北卡罗来纳州海滩上贝壳的照片，而且这不会是结束。但我没有改变。我仍然是清白的，我仍然不害怕，我仍然相信独立的联邦司法机构，所以让我们开始吧。但非常重要的是，我们所有人都必须记住，这不是我们作为一个国家的本来面目。司法部不应该是这样的。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Pakistan has reportedly activated six overland trade corridors into Iran to work around the U.S. blockade, facilitating the movement of more than 3,000 containers, according to Fars News Agency. Effective immediately, the arrangement permits a wide range of goods, including canned imports from third countries, to be transported through Pakistan using routes that connect Gwadar, Karachi, and Port Qasim with the Taftan and Gabd border crossings. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 据法尔斯通讯社报道，巴基斯坦据称已启动六条通往伊朗的陆路贸易走廊，以绕过美国的封锁，促进了超过 3,000 个集装箱的运输。该安排立即生效，允许包括来自第三国的罐装进口商品在内的多种商品，通过连接瓜达尔、卡拉奇和卡西姆港与塔夫坦和加布德边境口岸的路线，经由巴基斯坦运输。 推文

text: Open Source Intel James Comey on indictment: “I’m still innocent and I’m still unafraid.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049244216845332755/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel James Comey 关于起诉书的回应：“我仍然是清白的，我仍然无所畏惧。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049244216845332755/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The King of the United Kingdom Charles III receives a standing ovation from the United States Congress after mentioning the need for the continued support to Ukraine. "In the immediate aftermath of 9/11, when NATO invoked Article 5 for the first time and the United Nations Security Council was united in the face of terror, we answered the call together, as our people have done so for more than a century, shoulder to shoulder through two world wars, the Cold War, Afghanistan, and moments that have defined our shared security. Today, Mr. Speaker, that same unyielding resolve is needed for the defense of Ukraine and her most courageous people." tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 英国国王查尔斯三世在提到需要继续支持乌克兰后，获得了美国国会的起立鼓掌。“在 9/11 事件发生后，当北约首次援引第 5 条款，且联合国安理会在恐怖主义面前团结一致时，我们共同响应了号召，正如我们的人民一个多世纪以来所做的那样，在两次世界大战、冷战、阿富汗战争以及定义我们共同安全的时刻，肩并肩共同奋斗。今天，议长先生，保卫乌克兰及其最勇敢的人民也需要同样的坚定决心。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The U.S. State Department plans on releasing a commerative passport for the the U.S.'s 250th anniversary that prominently features U.S. President Trump's face. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国国务院计划发布一款纪念美国建国250周年的纪念护照，护照上将显著印有美国总统特朗普的头像。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted by the Justice Department on two felony counts: knowingly making a threat against the President and transmitting an interstate communication containing a threat to kill the President. Each count carries a maximum sentence of ten years. The charges stem from an Instagram post of seashells spelling “86 47” – a reference some interpret as eliminating (“86”) the 47th president, Donald Trump. Comey deleted the post, saying he did not realise some associate those numbers with violence and that he opposes violence of any kind. Legal analysts have called the indictment “petty”, “retributive” and a “stretch of the imagination”, predicting it will likely be dismissed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米已被司法部起诉，罪名是两项重罪：蓄意威胁总统，以及发送包含杀害总统威胁的州际通讯。每项罪名最高可判处十年监禁。这些指控源于他在Instagram上发布的一张海贝拼写“86 47”的照片——一些人将其解读为清除（“86”）第47任总统唐纳德·特朗普。科米删除了该帖子，称他没有意识到有些人会将这些数字与暴力联系起来，并表示他反对任何形式的暴力。法律分析人士称这项起诉“琐碎”、“报复性”且“牵强附会”，并预测该案很可能会被驳回。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Russia's May 9 parade will feature no military vehicles for the first time. The Defense Ministry blamed "the current operational situation." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049235424179081719/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：俄罗斯5月9日的阅兵式将首次不出现军用车辆。国防部将其归咎于“当前的作战形势”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049235424179081719/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Next week marks the anniversary of Rabbi Shimon bar Yochai’s passing, 200,000 to 400,000 people usually gather in Meron to celebrate, pray, dance and light bonfires in his honor. Meron is roughly 10 km from the border with Lebanon. The IDF will now limit this event to 1500 people. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：下周是拉比西蒙·巴尔·尤海（Rabbi Shimon bar Yochai）逝世周年纪念日，通常有20万至40万人聚集在梅龙（Meron）庆祝、祈祷、跳舞并点燃篝火以示纪念。梅龙距离黎巴嫩边境约10公里。以色列国防军（IDF）现在将把此次活动的人数限制在1500人以内。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇦🇪🇶🇦🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.1/prologue of events) On the sunny day of February 28th, U.S. and Israeli aircraft, vessels, and ground systems launched a series of airstrikes starting the “Ramadan War.” Yet…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.2 / The victories – what Iran won) With the launch of Iranian strikes targeting the Gulf and the region entirely, for the first time in modern times since the era of the Arab-Israeli wars, the Middle East was fully consumed by the flame of fury that war brought with it. Gulf oil and gas infrastructure sites were targeted across the region, and production in many of the world's largest plants either completely stopped or reduced. The Iranian missile or drone saw no difference between a Kuwaiti air base, a Qatari gas complex, or an Omani port. Iran also benefited greatly from this scheme with U.S. Treasury waivers allowing the sale of sanctioned oil with exports peaking at over 2 million barrels, becoming one of Iran's biggest financial victories second only to its plan of monopolizing transit through the Strait of Hormuz, which grants a permanent stream of revenue while also creating dependence on Iran for the strait. A parallel to the world's canals such as the Suez or Panama, which harbor and channel the world's trade and logistic supply lines. Iran's military and civilian cohesion is another fundamental victory. It remained steadfast and prepared with no cracks internally thanks to its strong security apparatus, allowing the government to stay in control, leverage state media, and wage the internet shutdown to successfully dominate the narrative domestically. Internationally, Iran also largely won the narrative war, with state-aligned media outlets and agencies successfully broadcasting the state's agenda. Whether this cohesion survives the coming inflation and reconstruction remains an open question, but for now, it held. Iran also saw great success in culling the region, inducing fear using its drones and military. Iran's media and affiliates also wagered this using Israeli-style evacuation warnings for critical infrastructure and at times civilian sites. Iran also saw a major achievement in damaging the U.S. reputation as a shield and barrier against Iranian attacks, as many U.S. bases — even in the largely unaffected Saudi Arabia — were damaged for years to come, with billions in dollars of losses. This comes without mentioning U.S. military failures in destroying Iranian missile bases, which are now coming back online steadily over time. Its military infrastructure is still largely intact and its nuclear program unfettered overall. Iran's regional proxies in particular proved their worth. Iraqi groups succeeded in targeting U.S.-affiliated sites and Iranian opposition groups, while also heavily damaging the U.S. Victoria Air Base at Baghdad Airport. Yemen once again became a critical "what‑if" factor, with the Bab el‑Mandeb Strait and intermittent launches toward Israel. Hezbollah, for its part, performed well overall, stretching Israeli forces thin and pulling away resources. Yet these gains did not come without losses. Israel decisively succeeded against Hezbollah during the hot phase of the conflict, though a ceasefire in Lebanon has since allowed Hezbollah to regroup and push back incrementally. In Iraq, U.S. airstrikes damaged key bases and killed a significant number of Iraqi PMF personnel, further eroding Iran's proxy network. On balance, the proxies delivered tactical disruptions but fell short of a strategic knockout, and their long-term viability remains tied to the unresolved question of resupply. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇦🇪🇶🇦🇴🇲 冰封的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得并输掉了伊朗战争（第一部分/事件序幕）在2月28日阳光明媚的一天，美国和以色列的飞机、舰船和地面系统发动了一系列空袭，开启了‘斋月战争’。然而……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 冰封的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得并输掉了伊朗战争（第二部分/胜利——伊朗赢得了什么）随着伊朗针对海湾地区及整个地区发动袭击，自阿拉伯-以色列战争时代以来，中东现代史上首次完全被战争带来的愤怒火焰所吞噬。海湾地区的石油和天然气基础设施站点在整个地区遭到袭击，世界上许多大型工厂的生产要么完全停止，要么减少。伊朗的导弹或无人机对科威特空军基地、卡塔尔天然气综合设施或阿曼港口一视同仁。伊朗也从这一计划中获益匪浅，美国财政部的豁免允许其出售受制裁的石油，出口量达到每天超过200万桶的峰值，这成为伊朗仅次于其垄断霍尔木兹海峡过境计划的第二大金融胜利，该计划在提供永久收入流的同时，也使海峡对伊朗产生了依赖。这与苏伊士运河或巴拿马运河等世界运河相提并论，它们承载并引导着世界的贸易和物流供应线。伊朗的军事和民事凝聚力是另一项根本性的胜利。得益于其强大的安全机构，它保持坚定并做好准备，内部没有出现裂痕，使政府能够保持控制、利用国家媒体并实施互联网封锁，从而成功在国内主导了叙事。在国际上，伊朗也在很大程度上赢得了叙事战争，与国家结盟的媒体和机构成功地传播了国家的议程。这种凝聚力能否在未来的通货膨胀和重建中存续仍是一个悬而未决的问题，但目前它确实保持住了。伊朗在震慑该地区方面也取得了巨大成功，利用其无人机和军事力量制造恐惧。伊朗的媒体和附属机构也利用这一点，针对关键基础设施甚至有时是民用场所发布了以色列式的撤离警告。伊朗在损害美国作为抵御伊朗袭击的盾牌和屏障的声誉方面也取得了重大成就，因为许多美国基地——即使是在很大程度上未受影响的沙特阿拉伯——也遭受了未来数年的破坏，损失达数十亿美元。这还不包括美国在摧毁伊朗导弹基地方面的军事失败，这些基地现在正随着时间的推移稳步恢复运行。其军事基础设施在很大程度上仍然完好无损，其核计划总体上未受阻碍。伊朗在该地区的代理人尤其证明了他们的价值。伊拉克组织成功地袭击了与美国有关的地点和伊朗反对派团体，同时也严重破坏了巴格达机场的美国维多利亚空军基地。也门再次成为一个关键的“假设”因素，曼德海峡和对以色列的间歇性发射就是证明。真主党方面总体表现良好，分散了以色列的兵力并牵制了资源。然而，这些收益并非没有损失。以色列在冲突的激烈阶段成功地对真主党取得了决定性胜利，尽管黎巴嫩的停火协议此后允许真主党重组并逐步反击。在伊拉克，美国的空袭破坏了关键基地并杀死了大量伊拉克人民动员组织（PMF）人员，进一步削弱了伊朗的代理人网络。总的来说，代理人造成了战术上的破坏，但未能实现战略上的击溃，其长期生存能力仍然与悬而未决的补给问题挂钩。@wfwitness

text: Israeli violation list ○○ملخص الإعتداءات الإسرائيلية على الأراضي اللبنانية بتاريخ ٢٨/٤/٢٠٢٦: ○○الغارات التي نفذها الطيران الحربي المعادي: شقرا تبنين تولين برعشيت خربة سلم زوطر الشرقية البازورية-وادي جيلو قبريخا المنصوري جبال البطم مجدلزون الشهابية طيردبا كفرتبنيت فرون الطيري جبشيت جويا ○○الغارات التي نفذها الطيران المسير المعادي: قبريخا بيوت السياد المنصوري بين الحوش و برج الشمالي مجدلزون القليلة الحنية ○○القصف المدفعي المعادي: كونين بيوت السياد المنصوري شقرا(فوسفوري) برعشيت(فوسفوري) ○○التفجيرات التي نفذها العدو في البلدات الجنوبية: القنطرة حانين شمع
text_zh: 以色列违规清单 ○○2026年4月28日以色列对黎巴嫩领土的袭击摘要： ○○敌方战机发动的空袭：沙克拉（Shaqra）、特布宁（Tebnine）、图林（Tulin）、巴拉希特（Braachit）、基尔贝特塞勒姆（Khirbet Selm）、东祖塔尔（Zoutar El Charqiyeh）、巴祖里耶-瓦迪吉卢（Bazouriyeh-Wadi Jilo）、卡布里哈（Qabrikha）、曼苏里（Mansouri）、杰贝尔巴特姆（Jabal al-Botm）、马吉达尔宗（Majdal Zoun）、谢哈比耶（Chihabiyeh）、泰尔德巴（Tayr Debba）、卡夫尔特布尼特（Kfar Tebnit）、法伦（Faroun）、泰里（Tiri）、杰布希特（Jibchit）、朱亚（Jwaya） ○○敌方无人机发动的空袭：卡布里哈（Qabrikha）、比尤特塞亚德（Biout al-Sayyad）、曼苏里（Mansouri）、豪什（Al-Housh）与布尔吉沙马利（Borj El Chemali）之间、马吉达尔宗（Majdal Zoun）、卡利拉（Qlaileh）、汉尼亚（Haniyeh） ○○敌方炮击：科宁（Konin）、比尤特塞亚德（Biout al-Sayyad）、曼苏里（Mansouri）、沙克拉（Shaqra）（磷弹）、巴拉希特（Braachit）（磷弹） ○○敌方在南部城镇实施的爆炸：坎塔拉（Qantara）、哈宁（Hanine）、沙马（Chama）

text: ⭕️ دفاعًا عن لبنان وشعبه، وردًّا على خرق العدوّ الإسرائيليّ لوقف إطلاق النار، والإعتداء على المدنيّين وتدمير بيوتهم وقراهم في جنوب لبنان، واستنادًا إلى الحقّ في مقاومة الاحتلال ودحره، أصدرت المقاومة الإسلامية بتاريخ الثلاثاء 28/04/2026، 6 بيانات عسكرية وفقًا للآتي: 1- الساعة 13:00 ردًا على هدم البيوت في قرى جنوب لبنان، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة جرّافة عسكريّة إسرائيليّة أثناء قيامها بهدم البيوت في مدينة بنت جبيل بمحلّقة انقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة. 2- الساعة 13:00 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى في جنوب لبنان وأسفرت عن ارتقاء شهداء وعدد من الجرحى بين المدنيّين، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة تجمّعًا لجنود جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في ساحة بلدة القنطرة بمحلّقة انقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة. 3- الساعة 14:00 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى وهدم البيوت في جنوب لبنان، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة دبّابة ميركافا في ساحة بلدة القنطرة بمحلّقة انقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة. 4- الساعة 18:10 ردًا على استباحته الأجواء اللبنانيّة، أسقط مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة طائرة مسيّرة تابعة لجيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ من نوع "هرمز 900" في أجواء بلدة القنطرة بصاروخ أرض جو. 5- الساعة 18:30 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى في جنوب لبنان وأسفرت عن ارتقاء شهداء وعدد من الجرحى بين المدنيّين، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة تجمّعًا لجنود جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في بلدة الطيبة بسربٍ من المسيّرات الانقضاضيّة. 6- الساعة 23:20 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى في جنوب لبنان وأسفرت عن ارتقاء شهداء وعدد من الجرحى بين المدنيّين، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة تجمّعًا لجنود جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في موقع نمر الجمل المستحدث بسربٍ من المسيّرات الانقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكدة. إنّ المقاومة الاسلاميّة معنيّة بالدفاع عن أرضها وشعبها خصوصًا مع تجاوز العدو الإسرائيلي الحدود بإجرامه، وهذا أقل الواجب للجمه ومنعه من التمادي في أهدافه الخطيرة على لبنان دولةً وشعباً ومقاومة. #معركة_العصف_المأكول #دفاعا_عن_لبنان_وشعبه #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: ⭕️ 为了保卫黎巴嫩及其人民，回应以色列敌军违反停火协议、袭击平民并摧毁黎巴嫩南部房屋和村庄的行为，基于抵抗占领和击退侵略的权利，伊斯兰抵抗组织于2026年4月28日星期二发布了6份军事声明，内容如下： 1- 13:00，为回应在黎巴嫩南部村庄拆毁房屋的行为，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用自杀式无人机袭击了一辆正在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）市拆毁房屋的以色列军用推土机，并取得了确切命中。 2- 13:00，为回应针对黎巴嫩南部村庄并导致平民伤亡的袭击，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用自杀式无人机袭击了坎塔拉（Qantara）镇广场上的以色列敌军士兵集结地，并取得了确切命中。 3- 14:00，为回应针对村庄的袭击和在黎巴嫩南部拆毁房屋的行为，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用自杀式无人机袭击了坎塔拉（Qantara）镇广场上的一辆梅卡瓦坦克，并取得了确切命中。 4- 18:10，为回应其对黎巴嫩领空的侵犯，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士在坎塔拉（Qantara）镇上空使用地对空导弹击落了一架以色列敌军的“赫尔墨斯900”（Hermes 900）无人机。 5- 18:30，为回应针对黎巴嫩南部村庄并导致平民伤亡的袭击，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用一群自杀式无人机袭击了泰比（Taybeh）镇的以色列敌军士兵集结地。 6- 23:20，为回应针对黎巴嫩南部村庄并导致平民伤亡的袭击，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用一群自杀式无人机袭击了新建的尼姆尔贾迈勒（Nimr al-Jamal）阵地上的以色列敌军士兵集结地，并取得了确切命中。伊斯兰抵抗组织致力于保卫其土地和人民，特别是在以色列敌军的罪行越界的情况下。这是遏制敌军并阻止其继续对黎巴嫩国家、人民和抵抗力量实施危险目标的最低限度义务。 #暴风雨之战 #保卫黎巴嫩及其人民 #战争媒体

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Local sources in Daraa Governorate reported multiple Israeli reconnaissance drones above southern Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 德拉省当地消息来源报告称，叙利亚南部上空出现多架以色列侦察无人机。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING 🇦🇪 The United Arab Emirates, the third-largest oil producer in OPEC, has announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ starting May 1. 🛢️ This move would free the UAE from production quotas, allowing it to: ▪️ Increase oil output to full capacity ▪️ Set its own export strategy ▪️ Price crude independently of group restrictions 🟦 The decision could boost UAE production, strengthen state revenues, and put downward pressure on global oil prices. ▪️ Lower prices and increased supply would likely align with President Trump’s long-standing calls for cheaper energy and criticism of OPEC limits. 🟥 Amid rising tensions with Iran, the UAE’s exit could act as a strategic buffer for the global economy: 🟦 Around 20% of global oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has repeatedly threatened to close. ▪️ The UAE, however, can bypass Hormuz via the Habshan–Fujairah pipeline, exporting oil directly to the Gulf of Oman. Freed from OPEC quotas, it could maximize output through this route, weakening Iran’s leverage over global supply. ▪️ In the event of renewed conflict, sanctions, or infrastructure strikes, Iran’s oil exports — largely dependent on China — could collapse. 🔺 The UAE, with significant spare capacity, could quickly offset supply losses, preventing extreme price spikes (e.g. $150–200 per barrel) that would damage Western economies. 🔹 Reduced OPEC coordination would also limit Iran’s ability to influence global markets through price manipulation. 🇨🇳 China, a major buyer of Iranian oil, could be forced to shift toward UAE supplies, further isolating Tehran economically. 🔺 If Iran physically blocks Hormuz, the UAE’s pipeline system becomes critical: ▪️ It can transport 1.5–1.8 million barrels per day — over half of UAE exports ▪️ Tankers can load outside the Strait, reducing risk and insurance costs 🔺 Fujairah, located outside Hormuz, offers a safer and cheaper export hub compared to Gulf ports dependent on the Strait. Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : #突发 🇦🇪 作为欧佩克（OPEC）第三大石油生产国，阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+。 🛢️ 此举将使阿联酋摆脱生产配额限制，从而能够： ▪️ 将石油产量提高至满负荷 ▪️ 制定自己的出口战略 ▪️ 在集团限制之外独立定价原油 🟦 此决定可能提振阿联酋产量，增加国家收入，并对全球油价产生下行压力。 ▪️ 更低的价格和增加的供应可能符合特朗普总统长期以来对廉价能源的呼吁以及对欧佩克限制的批评。 🟥 在与伊朗紧张局势加剧的背景下，阿联酋的退出可能成为全球经济的战略缓冲： 🟦 全球约20%的石油流经霍尔木兹海峡，伊朗已多次威胁要关闭该海峡。 ▪️ 然而，阿联酋可以通过哈布山-富查伊拉（Habshan–Fujairah）管道绕过霍尔木兹海峡，直接向阿曼湾出口石油。摆脱欧佩克配额后，它可以最大限度地通过该路线提高产量，从而削弱伊朗对全球供应的影响力。 ▪️ 如果发生新的冲突、制裁或基础设施袭击，主要依赖中国的伊朗石油出口可能会崩溃。 🔺 阿联酋拥有巨大的闲置产能，可以迅速抵消供应损失，防止可能损害西方经济的极端价格飙升（例如每桶150-200美元）。 🔹 减少欧佩克的协调也将限制伊朗通过价格操纵影响全球市场的能力。 🇨🇳 作为伊朗石油的主要买家，中国可能被迫转向阿联酋供应，从而在经济上进一步孤立德黑兰。 🔺 如果伊朗物理封锁霍尔木兹海峡，阿联酋的管道系统将变得至关重要： ▪️ 它每天可输送150万至180万桶石油，超过阿联酋出口量的一半 ▪️ 油轮可以在海峡外装载，降低风险和保险成本 🔺 位于霍尔木兹海峡之外的富查伊拉，与依赖海峡的海湾港口相比，提供了一个更安全、更廉价的出口枢纽。视频由grok AI推文生成

text: The Spectator Index New version of US passports will feature a photo of President Trump inside, according to Washington Post. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华盛顿邮报》报道，新版美国护照内页将印有特朗普总统的照片。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) For the first time since 1945, the May 9th Victory Day Parade in Moscow will not involve the showcase of military equipment columns. Russian Defense Ministry informed that the main display of ground military equipment will not take place due to the "current operational situation." tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 自1945年以来，莫斯科5月9日胜利日阅兵式将首次不展示军事装备方阵。俄罗斯国防部通知称，由于“当前作战形势”，地面军事装备的主要展示将不会进行。推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says the Air Force intercepted a Hezbollah drone after sirens sounded in the Western Galilee, shooting it down before it crossed from Lebanon into Israeli territory. Ceasefire continues. Hezbollah ceasefire rocket and drone attack right now https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049225601274274276/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称，在西加利利地区响起警报后，空军拦截了一架真主党无人机，并在其从黎巴嫩进入以色列领土前将其击落。停火仍在继续。真主党目前正在进行停火期间的火箭弹和无人机袭击 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049225601274274276/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT ELINT News RT @manniefabian : The IDF located and razed two major Hezbollah tunnels in the southern Lebanon town of Qantara, which it says were constructed by the terror group with "direct guidance" from Iran. The tunnels were built over a decade, reaching depths of some 25 meters, and were "funded by the Iranian terror regime and as part of Hezbollah's plan to conquer the Galilee," according to the military. The two tunnels — located near each other but not connected — span a total of some two kilometers in length, making it one of the longest underground systems found by the military in southern Lebanon to date. The IDF says the tunnels are part of a larger underground network located in the towns of Rab al-Thalathin and Mays al-Jabal during the fighting in 2024. The IDF believes the underground sites were intended by Hezbollah for use as a staging ground, where hundreds of terror operatives would arrive when called, gather equipment, and ready themselves to attack Israeli towns. Hezbollah's invasion plans never materialized. Troops of the 36th Division raided Qantara, some 10 kilometers from Israel's border, during the current offensive against Hezbollah, following "precise intelligence" of the tunnel systems, the military says. The entrances to the tunnels were relatively hidden. Inside the tunnels, the IDF says troops located numerous weapons and equipment that Hezbollah operatives could use to reside in the tunnels for long periods. One of the tunnels featured some ten rooms, each with several bunk beds. The tunnels also featured rocket-launching shafts, with launchers in them aimed at Israel, according to the military. According to military officials, the tunnels were built "to Iranian standards," and Iran was directly involved in the planning and funding of the underground systems. Today, using 450 tons of explosives, the military says it blew up the tunnels. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT ELINT News 转推 @manniefabian : 以色列国防军在黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉（Qantara）镇定位并摧毁了两条主要的真主党隧道，军方称这些隧道是在伊朗的“直接指导”下由该恐怖组织建造的。据军方称，这些隧道历时十年建成，深度达约25米，由“伊朗恐怖政权资助，是真主党征服加利利计划的一部分”。这两条隧道彼此靠近但不相连，总长度约两公里，是军方迄今在黎巴嫩南部发现的最长的地下系统之一。以色列国防军表示，这些隧道是2024年战斗期间在拉布塔拉辛（Rab al-Thalathin）和梅斯贾巴尔（Mays al-Jabal）城镇发现的更大地下网络的一部分。以色列国防军认为，这些地下设施是真主党计划用作集结地，当接到命令时，数百名恐怖分子将抵达此处，收集装备，并准备袭击以色列城镇。真主党的入侵计划从未实现。在当前针对真主党的攻势中，第36师的部队在获得有关隧道系统的“精确情报”后，突袭了距离以色列边境约10公里的坎塔拉。隧道入口相对隐蔽。以色列国防军称，在隧道内，部队发现了大量武器和装备，真主党武装人员可以在隧道内长期居住。其中一条隧道设有约十个房间，每个房间都有几张双层床。据军方称，隧道还设有火箭发射井，内部装有瞄准以色列的发射装置。据军方官员称，这些隧道是“按伊朗标准”建造的，伊朗直接参与了地下系统的规划和资助。军方称，今天使用了450吨炸药炸毁了这些隧道。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Todd Blanche says James Comey could face up to 20 years in prison after being indicted in the Eastern District of North Carolina. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049227822661591528/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 托德·布兰奇（Todd Blanche）表示，詹姆斯·科米（James Comey）在北卡罗来纳州东区被起诉后，可能面临最高20年的监禁。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049227822661591528/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @RpsAgainstTrump : King Charles reminds Trump and MAGA that NATO invoked Article 5 for the first time after 9/11, when all alliance members came to the aid of the United States. “Today, Mr. Speaker, that same unyielding resolve is needed for the defense of Ukraine and her most courageous people,” the king said, receiving a standing ovation 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @RpsAgainstTrump : 查尔斯国王提醒特朗普和“让美国再次伟大”（MAGA）运动，北约在9/11事件后首次援引了第五条款，当时所有盟国都来援助美国。国王说：“今天，议长先生，为了保卫乌克兰及其最勇敢的人民，同样需要这种坚定不移的决心。”并获得了起立鼓掌 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @atrupar : the new 2-page James Comey indictment is laughably thin. How in God's name did a grand jury vote to bring charges here? https://storage.courtlistener.com/recap/gov.uscourts.nced.227449/gov.uscourts.nced.227449.1.0_2.pdf tweet

text: WarTranslated Russian media report that this year's May 9th parade will feature military personnel from universities, but will exclude cadets, Suvorov military school students, and columns of military equipment. How are they supposed to showcase the "might and grandeur" of the Russian military-industrial complex now? Oh no! What happened? tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯媒体报道称，今年的5月9日阅兵式将有来自大学的军事人员参加，但将排除学员、苏沃洛夫军事学校学生和军事装备方阵。他们现在该如何展示俄罗斯军工复合体的“威力和宏大”？哦不！发生了什么？推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump's approval rating has fallen to 34%, the lowest of his second term, according to Reuters/Ipsos poll. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据路透社/益普索民调显示，特朗普的支持率已降至34%，为其第二任期内的最低水平。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - DOJ charges former FBI Director James Comey with two felony counts: knowingly making a threat against the President of the United States, and transmitting an interstate communication containing a threat to kill the President—each carrying a maximum of 10 years in prison. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049227030378533217/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️Hezbullah successfully killed an Israeli contractor working on demolishing civilian houses in Bint Jbeil" A Muslim Arabian Israeli (Palestinian) cunt. ☠️ The Israeli Defense Ministry contractor who was killed in a Hezbullah explosive drone attack in southern Lebanon today is named as Amer Hujirat, 44, from the northern Arab town of Shefa-Amr.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“❗️真主党成功杀害了一名在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）拆除平民房屋的以色列承包商” 一个穆斯林阿拉伯裔以色列人（巴勒斯坦人）混蛋。 ☠️ 今天在黎巴嫩南部真主党爆炸无人机袭击中丧生的以色列国防部承包商被确认为44岁的阿梅尔·胡贾拉特（Amer Hujirat），来自北部阿拉伯城镇谢法阿姆尔（Shefa-Amr）。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. State Department announced action against 35 entities and individuals accused of operating Iran’s covert financial network, as part of Washington’s maximum pressure campaign against Tehran. U.S. authorities said so-called shadow banking networks have helped transfer tens of billions of dollars to evade sanctions. The networks allegedly enabled Iran’s military forces, including the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, to access proceeds from illicit oil sales, obtain sensitive components for missile and weapons programmes, and finance proxy groups across the Middle East. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务院宣布对35个实体和个人采取行动，指控他们运营伊朗的秘密金融网络，这是华盛顿对德黑兰“极限施压”运动的一部分。美国当局表示，所谓的影子银行网络帮助转移了数百亿美元以规避制裁。据称，这些网络使伊朗军队（包括伊斯兰革命卫队）能够获得非法石油销售的收益，获取导弹和武器计划的敏感部件，并资助中东各地的代理人组织。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Fars News Agency: Pakistan has activated six transit corridors between Pakistan and Iran amid the US naval blockade on Iranian ports. The Pakistani Commerce Ministry issued the Goods Transit Order 2026, effective immediately, allowing canned goods from third countries to be transferred through Pakistani territory to Iran. The corridors originate from Gwadar, Karachi and Qasim ports, reaching the border crossings of Taftan and Gabd. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 法尔斯通讯社：在美军对伊朗港口实施海军封锁的情况下，巴基斯坦已启动了巴基斯坦与伊朗之间的六条过境走廊。巴基斯坦商务部发布了《2026年货物过境令》，立即生效，允许来自第三国的罐装货物通过巴基斯坦领土转运至伊朗。这些走廊始于瓜达尔港、卡拉奇港和卡西姆港，直达塔夫坦和加布德边境口岸。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Russian President Putin said Ukrainian forces are unable to stop Russian advances and are losing "territory daily, leading them to resort to terrorism." He cited the recent drone attack on the Tuapse oil refinery as having serious environmental consequences, and stressed that the fight against "terrorism" and extremism must be pursued seriously. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯总统普京表示，乌克兰军队无法阻止俄罗斯的推进，并且“每天都在失去领土，导致他们诉诸恐怖主义”。他提到最近对图阿普谢炼油厂的无人机袭击造成了严重的生态后果，并强调必须严肃对待打击“恐怖主义”和极端主义的斗争。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage shows a Israeli Smash fire control system mounted on an M4 carbine shooting down a Hezbollah drone with two shots. The Israeli‑made smart sight, developed by Smart Shooter, tracks moving targets and calculates the optimal firing moment, turning a standard rifle into a low‑cost counter‑drone weapon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 视频显示，安装在M4卡宾枪上的以色列Smash火控系统通过两次射击击落了一架真主党无人机。这种由Smart Shooter开发的以色列制造智能瞄准具可以跟踪移动目标并计算最佳射击时机，将标准步枪变成了低成本的反无人机武器。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released footage claiming to target an Israeli armoured personnel carrier in the southern Lebanese town of Al‑Qantara with an explosive‑laden drone. The video cuts out before the drone reaches the target. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布视频，声称在黎巴嫩南部阿尔-坎塔拉镇用一架装满炸药的无人机瞄准了一辆以色列装甲运兵车。视频在无人机到达目标前中断。 @wfwitness

text: 🗂 — To our valued Warfront Witnesses subscribers, we are pleased to announce that we are now part of The New Dawn folder. We are a collection of seven channels of broadly ideologically aligned news channels who try our best to ensure quality, quick, and accurate reporting. Of course, our views, while generally different, are accommodating of a wide spectrum of different views; we consist of different geographical distributions and religious beliefs. One major thing that unites us: We strive to bring you fast, factual news that you won't see elsewhere in the mainstream media—or even as fast—and we seek to destroy and dismantle any narrative in order to let the truth prevail and to usher in a New Dawn. /qySYHB6yadJiMjI8
text_zh: 🗂 — 致我们尊贵的Warfront Witnesses订阅者，我们很高兴地宣布，我们现在是“新黎明”（The New Dawn）文件夹的一部分。我们是由七个在意识形态上大致一致的新闻频道组成的集合，我们尽最大努力确保报道的质量、速度和准确性。当然，我们的观点虽然总体上有所不同，但能够包容广泛的不同观点；我们由不同的地理分布和宗教信仰组成。有一件重要的事情将我们团结在一起：我们努力为您带来在主流媒体中看不到——或者速度没那么快——的快速、真实的新闻，我们寻求摧毁和拆除任何叙事，以便让真相占上风，并迎来一个新黎明。 /qySYHB6yadJiMjI8

text: Serbia's President Aleksandar Vučić: Can you understand the argument where someone is casting spells against you? Even adding that your father actually is not your father because your mother was a whore and she was cheating your alleged father with one Albanian—and that’s why you are so much pro-Albanian.
text_zh: 塞尔维亚总统亚历山大·武契奇：你能理解有人对你施咒的论点吗？甚至还说你的父亲其实不是你的父亲，因为你的母亲是个妓女，她和一个阿尔巴尼亚人背着你所谓的父亲偷情——这就是为什么你如此亲阿尔巴尼亚。

text: Open Source Intel Ukriane right now 🧐 WILD FOOTAGE 🔴 Beautiful footage of a Smash fire control system mounted on an M4 taking down a Hezbollah drone with 2 shots. The SMASH fire control system is an Israeli made smart sight developed by Smart Shooter and mounted on an M4 Carbine that tracks moving targets such as drones and calculates the exact moment to fire. It helps shooters hit small fast aerial targets with high accuracy, turning a standard rifle into an effective low cost counter drone weapon. Footage via: @david_lisovtsev - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰现状 🧐 狂野镜头 🔴 安装在M4上的Smash火控系统通过2次射击击落一架真主党无人机的精美镜头。SMASH火控系统是以色列Smart Shooter公司开发的智能瞄准具，安装在M4卡宾枪上，可以跟踪无人机等移动目标并计算精确的射击时机。它帮助射手以高精度击中小型快速空中目标，将标准步枪变成了有效的低成本反无人机武器。视频来源：@david_lisovtsev - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Reuters, citing two U.S. officials with knowledge on the matter, agencies within the U.S. intelligence community have been given the direction of assessing the likelihood that Iranian decision-makers will react adversely if U.S. President Donald J. Trump declares a “unilateral” victory and moves to pull back from previous commitments to a conflict with the Persian nation. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据路透社援引两名知情的美国官员的话称，美国情报界内部的机构已接到指示，评估如果美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普宣布“单方面”胜利并采取行动撤回之前对与这个波斯国家冲突的承诺，伊朗决策者做出负面反应的可能性。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel RT @TheMossadIL : 150,000 dead. 14 million displaced. Mass rape. Ethnic killings. Famine. Aid blocked. Hospitals destroyed. Cities turned into rubble. Since we're talking about Sudan, that's... 0 UNGA condemnations 0 ICC cases 0 ICJ cases 0 campus tent cities 0 celebrity hunger strikes 0 Piers Morgan daily screaming matches. 150,000 dead, 14 million displaced: The story of Sudan’s war An estimated 150,000 people have been killed and more than 14 million displaced. Sudan’s current war has become one of the world’s worst humanitarian disasters, with 2 rival factions, both accused of widespread atrocities, fighting for control of the country. The conflict has just entered its 4th year. It began in April 2023 when a fragile power-sharing arrangement between the Sudanese Armed Forces led by Abdel Fattah al-Burhan and the Rapid Support Forces commanded by Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo collapsed into open warfare. What began as a struggle between 2 former allies has devastated the country. The 2 sides had jointly helped remove former ruler Omar al-Bashir in 2019 and later shared power after a military takeover in 2021. But tensions deepened over plans to merge the RSF into the regular army, command structures, and control of Sudan’s political transition, eventually erupting into war in the capital Khartoum. The conflict has since spread across Darfur, Kordofan and central Sudan. Cities, hospitals, markets and infrastructure have been destroyed, while famine and acute hunger have spread across several regions. Both factions have been accused by rights groups of ethnic killings, rape, looting, indiscriminate attacks and blocking aid. Diplomatically, neither side offers a clean option. The RSF, rooted in the Janjaweed militias tied to past Darfur atrocities, has faced severe accusations of massacres and ethnic killings. The SAF has also been accused of strikes on civilian areas and other abuses. Some Western governments are seen as more open to the RSF, while the SAF faces scrutiny over Islamist influence, Muslim Brotherhood links and Iranian IRGC support. Bottom line, neither side are heroes. And there is no end in sight. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel RT @TheMossadIL : 15万人死亡。1400万人流离失所。大规模强奸。种族屠杀。饥荒。援助被封锁。医院被摧毁。城市变成废墟。既然我们在谈论苏丹，那是…… 0次联合国大会谴责 0起国际刑事法院案件 0起国际法院案件 0个校园帐篷营地 0次名人绝食抗议 0场皮尔斯·摩根的每日尖叫比赛。15万人死亡，1400万人流离失所：苏丹战争的故事。据估计，已有15万人丧生，超过1400万人流离失所。苏丹目前的战争已成为世界上最严重的人道主义灾难之一，两个敌对派系都在争夺国家控制权，双方都被指控犯有广泛的暴行。这场冲突刚刚进入第4个年头。它始于2023年4月，当时由阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·布尔汉领导的苏丹武装部队与穆罕默德·哈姆丹·达加洛指挥的快速支援部队之间脆弱的权力分享安排崩溃，演变成公开战争。这场始于两个前盟友之间的斗争摧毁了这个国家。双方曾共同帮助推翻了前统治者奥马尔·巴希尔，并在2021年军事接管后分享权力。但关于将快速支援部队并入正规军、指挥结构以及控制苏丹政治过渡的计划，紧张局势加剧，最终在首都喀土穆爆发了战争。此后，冲突蔓延到达尔富尔、科尔多凡和苏丹中部。城市、医院、市场和基础设施被摧毁，饥荒和严重饥饿蔓延到几个地区。两个派系都被人权组织指控犯有种族屠杀、强奸、抢劫、无差别攻击和封锁援助等罪行。在外交上，双方都没有提供一个干净的选择。快速支援部队植根于与过去达尔富尔暴行有关的贾贾威德民兵，面临着大屠杀和种族屠杀的严重指控。苏丹武装部队也被指控对平民区进行打击和其他虐待行为。一些西方政府被认为对快速支援部队更开放，而苏丹武装部队则因伊斯兰主义影响、与穆斯林兄弟会的联系以及伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的支持而受到审查。底线是，双方都不是英雄。而且看不到尽头。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel We are dealing with funniest “ceasefire” in Lebanon I’m hearing loud blasts all day. Interceptions, rockets, airstrikes, drones, controlled explosions, jets, helicopters, artillery, literally every sound of war. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我们正在经历黎巴嫩最滑稽的“停火”，我整天都能听到巨大的爆炸声。拦截、火箭弹、空袭、无人机、受控爆炸、喷气式飞机、直升机、火炮，简直是战争的每一种声音。 推文
